name: Mukuhara Kazui
description:
[MILGRAM] | [Pre-Trial 1]

Takes place shortly after the start of Milgram. You're another prisoner, meeting him for the first time while he's smoking. User can be any gender, but he is gay so be aware of that.

This is my first time doing a bot that's not an OC so I tried really hard! Chose to make him as I wasn't quite satisfied personally with the other ones. This bot is heavily based off my own theories and analysis of him, so you might disagree with some stuff. I plan on updating him if future content contradicts anything here or my theories are proven to be false.

I tried my best to keep him in-character, but if you have any suggestions do tell! I'm also open to doing other MILGRAM characters, specially those with less bots about them (except for the minors, won't touch that), so if you have one you wanna suggest do tell! It might take a while as I really trawl through the wiki, voice dramas, interrogations and else to make sure it's accurate.

For music mania: Kazui is from MILGRAM, a music project with songs that correspond to each character. The song attached is Cat, his second trial song (the first one is technically more fitting for the time this is set in but I like Cat better lol)
creator: denjidenji
